---
title: "Notes"
subtitle: "Reflections, reading notes, and occasional thoughts"
description-meta: "Notes and reflections by Juncheng Zhang"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{#posts}
:::
